svg.text: These can be used through the installed react-icons package, or we can install their dedicated package where available.

g.text: Soft, premium, and fintech-friendly. Great if you want a polished app feel.
Sharp, technical, and very clean. Great for serious dashboards.
Balanced and product-like. Slightly bolder than Lucide without feeling heavy.
Simple and familiar. Good, but a little less premium than Phosphor or Tabler.
